ClawSpring clean-room Claude Code reimplementation
==================================================

Source: user-supplied archive `collection-claude-code-source-code-main.zip`,
subdirectory `clawspring`.

Only the clean-room Python reimplementation files are vendored here. The
archive also contains folders described by its own README as raw leaked or
decompiled Claude Code source; those folders are intentionally excluded from
CrucibAI.

Vendored files:

- `agent.py`
- `tool_registry.py`
- `LICENSE`

The upstream `clawspring/pyproject.toml` declares license text "MIT"; the
included upstream `LICENSE` file is Apache License 2.0. We preserve the
included license file with the vendored source.
